scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=@janatha/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=@janatha/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build --workspace=@janatha/frontend && cp -r packages/frontend/dist dist && cp packages/frontend/assets/images/logo.png dist/favicon.png
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:frontend
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run build:frontend && npx wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.deploy:frontend:preview: npm run build:frontend && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --branch preview
scripts.d1:migrate: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db --file=migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db --local --file=migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:preview: npx wrangler d1 execute chinmaya-janata-db-preview --file=migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql --config packages/backend/wrangler.toml
